Video.title: Presented by Ford

Video.summary: UCLA and Oklahoma combine for six (6) Perfect 10s in star-studded performance at Pauley Pavilion (2/4/18)
Video.title: 2018 Oklahoma at UCLA

Video.summary: Jade Carey (39.800) shatters all-around program-record 39.750 (Chari Knight, 1993) in front of Beaver Nation
Video.title: 2022 UCLA at Oregon State

Video.summary: AJ Singer 8th inning grand slam propels Oregon State to 6-1 comeback win vs. Cal State Fullerton
Video.title: Cal State Fullerton at #6 Oregon State (4/18/26)

Cal State Fullerton at #6 Oregon State (4/18/26)

Video.summary: Sophina DeJesus' 'Salute' floor exercise at Pauley Pavilion becomes an instant UCLA viral sensation (2/6/16).
Video.title: 2016 Utah at UCLA

Video.title: 2023 LSU at Utah

Video.summary: Margzetta Frazier won all-around, tying a career-high with a 39.550.
Video.title: 2021 Oregon State at UCLA

Video.summary: No. 6 UCLA opens up its season with a 196.550-196.300 victory over No. 3 Alabama in Westwood. (Jan. 10, 2016)
Video.title: 2016 Alabama at UCLA

Video.summary: Christine Peng-Peng Lee perfect 10 on bars, Katelyn Ohashi perfect 10 on balance beam as UCLA defeats UNC.
Video.title: 2017 North Carolina at UCLA

Video.summary: WSU forces Sam Darnold fumble late, kicks game winning field goal to defeat Trojans in a Pullman thriller
Video.title: #5 USC at #16 Washington State (9/29/17)

Video.title: 2016 Oklahoma at UCLA
